# Generated client-like continuous NL aggregate.
# Do not edit by hand; regenerate with scripts/nl_tests/build_client_like_case_aggregate.py.
# Deduplication: global prompt text for non-continuous cases; continuous chains keep duplicate prompts.
# Run:
#   bash scripts/nl_tests/run_client_like_continuous_suite.sh --case-file scripts/nl_tests/cases/nl_cases_client_like_all_aggregate.txt --prompt-reply-only --quality-guard
# include_risky=False
# stats=files_seen=90 files_skipped_risky=2 files_skipped_temp=21 rows_deduped=539 rows_emitted=1231 rows_expect_dropped=70 rows_seen=1320 rows_skipped_risky=5
# Format: suite|name|tags|prompt|expect=optional substring
